title: Shayne McGregor — Frontend & Full-Stack Software Engineer
markdown:
# Shayne McGregor

Frontend & Full-Stack Software Engineer · Accessibility-minded web platforms

[shaynemcgregor.dev](https://shaynemcgregor.dev) · [GitHub](https://github.com/SMcGregor199) · [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/shayne-mcgregor) · shaynemcgregor1@gmail.com

## Summary

Frontend and full-stack software engineer who builds accessible, maintainable web platforms for research, education, and mission-driven organizations. Experienced in translating stakeholder needs into responsive interfaces, CMS components, API and data integrations, and dependable publishing workflows.

## Experience

### Dynamic Campus at Marywood University — Frontend Software Engineer
*July 2023–present · Remote*

- Build responsive, reusable public-web components and templates with JavaScript, jQuery, HTML, CSS, Velocity, and dotCMS.
- Developed a faculty and administrator profile system integrating PHP, Node.js, and Colleague/MSSQL data.
- Partner with institutional stakeholders on enrollment and content-publishing experiences, documentation, and web-platform improvements.
- Advance accessible web practices through recurring WCAG 2.1 reviews, QA, and remediation work.

### Center Centre — Web Developer
*December 2022–June 2023 · Remote*

- Built enrollment and operational workflows connecting Zapier, Stripe, GoHighLevel, landing pages, and internal tools.
- Migrated WordPress sites, databases, and files to DigitalOcean using MySQL, shell/SSH, and Cloudflare DNS.
- Documented distributed-team systems in Notion and supported marketing and transactional email operations.

### Campaign Zero — Frontend Web Developer
*June 2022–June 2023 · Remote*

- Built responsive front-end features with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SvelteKit, and WordPress from Figma designs.
- Delivered interactive site features, performed cross-browser and accessibility QA, and contributed to content and design-system guidance.
- Supported WordPress and Airtable data migration and campaign operations.

### Yale University, Blended Reality Lab — Research Project Assistant, 3D/Mixed Reality
*January 2021–May 2022*

- Scoped interactive educational software and mixed-reality projects with researchers and designers.
- Collaborated on an educational game in C# and Unity and helped migrate a WordPress archive to Drupal.

## Selected project

### Personal website and blog platform

Built and maintain a personal publishing platform that combines a React front end with Node.js and TypeScript services, a Notion-backed editorial workflow, subscriber tooling, Airtable-backed reactions, and an RSS feed generator.

**Technology:** React, Node.js, TypeScript, Vite, Vitest, Notion API, Airtable, Go, Netlify, Resend

## Skills

**Front end:** JavaScript, TypeScript, React, SvelteKit, HTML, CSS, jQuery, Vite

**Back end and data:** Node.js, PHP, SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, REST/API integrations

**Platforms:** dotCMS, WordPress, Drupal, DigitalOcean, Cloudflare, Zapier, GitHub

**Accessibility and quality:** WCAG 2.1, ARIA, CPACC, usability evaluation, cross-browser QA

## Education and certifications

- Ph.D., African American Studies and English — Yale University
- M.A. and B.A., English — Brooklyn College
- Certified Professional in Accessibility Core Competencies (CPACC)
- Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
